title: (Bullish Signal) JKS, Moving Average Convergence Divergence Histogram just turned positive
author: tickeron_community
selftext:
This is a Bullish indicator signaling JKS's price could rise from here. Traders may explore going long the stock or buying call options. Tickeron's A.I. dvisor identified 52 similar cases where JKS's MACD histogram became positive, and 41 of them led to successful outcomes. Odds of Success: 79%. Current price $70.30 is above $24.01 the highest resistance line found by Tickeron A.I. Throughout the month of 10/27/20 - 11/27/20, the price experienced a +22% Uptrend. During the week of 11/19/20 - 11/27/20, the stock enjoyed a +22% Uptrend growth.

https://preview.redd.it/8p71w0gu1f261.png?width=1528&format=png&auto=webp&s=d34cf8f9df417dd3e0f481f8b8447a85e9ac7eed

**Bullish Trend Analysis**

The Momentum Indicator moved above the 0 level on November 23, 2020. You may want to consider a long position or call options on JKS as a result. Tickeron A.I. detected that in 77 of 93 past instances where the momentum indicator moved above 0, the stock continued to climb. The odds of a continued upward trend are 83%.

The Moving Average Convergence Divergence (MACD) for JKS just turned positive on November 27, 2020. Looking at past instances where JKS's MACD turned positive, the stock continued to rise, Tickeron A.I. shows that in 41 of 52 cases over the following month. The odds of a continued upward trend are 79%.

JKS moved above its 50-day Moving Average on September 11, 2020 date and that indicates a change from a downward trend to an upward trend.

The 50-day Moving Average for JKS moved above the 200-day moving average on August 05, 2020. This could be a long-term bullish signal for the stock as the stock shifts to an upward trend.

Following a +7.95% 3-day Advance, the price is estimated to grow further. Considering data from situations where JKS advanced for three days, in 243 of 304 cases, the price rose further within the following month. The odds of a continued upward trend are 80%.
